name: opennori
description: OpenNori helps coding agents turn natural-language goals into human-reviewable acceptance contracts, evidence, and reports.

interface.shortDescription: Acceptance contracts and evidence for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: OpenNori ships Codex Skills as agent behavior protocols for turning natural-language goals into human-centered acceptance contracts, architecture baselines, reviewable evidence, project health checks, and completion reports without making users memorize CLI flags.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenNori to turn this goal into acceptance criteria.
Is this OpenNori goal complete yet?
